tagline: June 10, 2026 Lakeflow Connect now supports a managed connector for ingestion from Zip.
what_it_does: June 10, 2026 Lakeflow Connect now supports a managed connector for ingestion from Zip. See [Zip connector](/aws/en/ingestion/lakeflow connect/zip).
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

capabilities.title: June 10, 2026 Lakeflow
capabilities.desc: June 10, 2026 Lakeflow Connect now supports a managed connector for ingestion from Zip.

key_takeaway: June 10, 2026 Lakeflow Connect now supports a managed connector for ingestion from Zip.
